ddls:
CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "customer_reference_no" TEXT /* Reference number assigned by the customer (foundation) */,
  "beneficiary_reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID assigned to the beneficiary */,
  "debit_account_number" TEXT /* Account number from which the payment is debited */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_value_date" TEXT /* Date the payment is scheduled to be processed */,
  "beneficiary_account_number" TEXT /* Account number to which the payment is credited */,
  "beneficiary_address_1" TEXT /* First line of the beneficiary's address */,
  "beneficiary_address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the beneficiary's address */,
  "beneficiary_swift_code" TEXT /* SWIFT code of the beneficiary's bank */,
  "beneficiary_bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary's bank */,
  "beneficiary_bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the beneficiary's bank */,
  "payment_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "payment_details_1" TEXT /* First line of payment details */,
  "payment_details_2" TEXT /* Second line of payment details */,
  "beneficiary_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the beneficiary */,
  "intermediary_bank_code" TEXT /* Code of the intermediary bank (if applicable) */,
  "intermediary_bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the intermediary bank (if applicable) */,
  "intermediary_bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the intermediary bank (if applicable) */,
  "payment_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the payment (e.g., initial allowance, annual fee) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, processed, failed) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., wire transfer, ACH) */,
  "payment_source" TEXT /* Source of the payment (e.g., foundation account, grant) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the payment record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_beneficiary_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_beneficiary_swift_code FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_swift_code") REFERENCES banks ("bank_swift_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_beneficiary_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("beneficiary_reference_id") REFERENCES beneficiaries ("beneficiary_reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_currency FOREIGN KEY ("payment_currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_intermediary_bank_code FOREIGN KEY ("intermediary_bank_code") REFERENCES intermediary_banks ("intermediary_bank_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID assigned to the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_account_number" TEXT /* Account number of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_swift_code" TEXT /* SWIFT code of the beneficiary's bank */,
  "beneficiary_bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the beneficiary's bank */,
  "beneficiary_bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the beneficiary's bank */,
  "beneficiary_address_1" TEXT /* First line of the beneficiary's address */,
  "beneficiary_address_2" TEXT /* Second line of the beneficiary's address */,
  "beneficiary_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_email" TEXT /* Email address of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_major" TEXT /* Major of the beneficiary */,
  "beneficiary_institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the beneficiary is attending */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_details" (
  "payment_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment detail */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment transaction */,
  "payment_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "payment_details_1" TEXT /* First line of payment details */,
  "payment_details_2" TEXT /* Second line of payment details */,
  "payment_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the payment (e.g., initial allowance, annual fee) */,
  "payment_source" TEXT /* Source of the payment (e.g., foundation account, grant) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., wire transfer, ACH) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payment detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment detail was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment detail */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment detail was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the payment detail record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_details_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "banks" (
  "bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_swift_code" TEXT /* SWIFT code of the bank */,
  "bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the bank */,
  "bank_type" TEXT /* Type of the bank (e.g., central bank, commercial bank) */,
  "bank_website" TEXT /* Website of the bank */,
  "bank_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the bank */,
  "bank_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intermediary_banks" (
  "intermediary_bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intermediary bank */,
  "intermediary_bank_code" TEXT /* Code of the intermediary bank */,
  "intermediary_bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the intermediary bank */,
  "intermediary_bank_address" TEXT /* Address of the intermediary bank */,
  "intermediary_bank_type" TEXT /* Type of the intermediary bank (e.g., central bank, commercial bank) */,
  "intermediary_bank_website" TEXT /* Website of the intermediary bank */,
  "intermediary_bank_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the intermediary bank */,
  "intermediary_bank_contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the intermediary bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intermediary_bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., £, $) */,
  "currency_decimal_places" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places used for the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code of the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_flag" TEXT /* Flag of the country */,
  "country_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "country_currency" TEXT /* Primary currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., payment processor, auditor, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, approved) */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., payment, user) */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., API, web interface) */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., success, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_logs_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
